title: Vex Legacy
description: Minecraft Legacy with newer additions, Possible by the usage of mods.
body:
# Summary
This modpack is the modification of many things to the formula of Minecraft itself, From changing its looks into Legacy Versions. And many other QOL inclusion within this modpack.


It's only made for the usage of playing in our own server called **"Vex Survival"**, But don't worry, You can still play with this modpack within your single-player worlds or in any server that you install the Mods we used.

* Recreation of Console Edition features (With Legacy4J)
* Multiplayer Intended (Can be used to play in single-player too)
* Version 1.21 Made (May change in the future, Not sure)
* Sodium + Iris included (For Optimization)
* All Skin Packs (From Console Editions, Via LegacySkins)
* Optimization mods are also included like Ferritcore, Entityculling and etc.


Note -> This modpack can be played on android (Not IOS as of currently, Not the sodium workaround at least) but with the help of Pojav Launcher, and it's LTW renderer, You can use that to run Sodium which isn't supported in normal renderers via Pojav.
[Debug Version](https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher/actions/runs/11180313158) of the Launcher with LTW.
